directives.directive: Use content angles that win: persona_driven, educational
directives.evidence: Top scorers use these angles: persona_driven (17x), educational (3x)

directives.directive: Use these hook types: announcement, personal_story
Emphasize has substantive replies in content
Avoid over-focusing on replies not generic — it correlates with lower scores
Avoid over-focusing on covers urgency — it correlates with lower scores
Avoid over-focusing on no hashtags — it correlates with lower scores
Avoid over-focusing on no emdash — it correlates with lower scores
Avoid over-focusing on not start mention — it correlates with lower scores
Emphasize challenges status quo in content
Avoid over-focusing on good grammar — it correlates with lower scores
